chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-322 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing 1. For orders as on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 26.02.2026 Mr. Idrees Alvi, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Habib Ahmed, Special Prosecutor Pakistan Rangers (Sindh) M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh and Sageer Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocates General, Sindh alongwith SIP Jamshed Alam, P.S Nabi Bux, Karachi ---------------------- At the very outset, the police official present submits that the missing person namely Osama Anjum Alim S/o Anjum Alim has been surfaced and reached home safely. Learned counsel for the petitioner admits the above assertion and seeks disposal of instant petition accordingly, which too is not opposed by the other side. Order accordingly. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
